variants.name: 养蜂人
variants.ability: 一名邪恶玩家会被当作善良阵营、镇民或外来者。每局游戏限一次，如果你公开猜测到这名玩家是谁，你的阵营获胜。

variants.name: 养蜂人
variants.ability: 如果你在夜晚死亡，你会得知一个在场的邪恶角色：他醉酒两天两夜。
variants.otherNightReminder: If the Beekeeper died tonight, wake them & tell them an in-play evil character. Then, put the Beekeeper to sleep & mark the player with that character with the Beekeeper's DRUNK(4) reminder token: They are drunk. If an evil player is already drunk, swap their token for the next, unless there isn't another reminder - at this point, they sober up.
variants.flavor: Attack the queen bee and be stung by her workers.

variants.name: 养蜂人
